_comment: Transmission quotes for the center panel + the chat RANDOM button. Open-source friendly (no crude language). Edit or replace these freely, or turn them off entirely via settings (chaos.quotes = false).
transmissions: M-U-N that spells moon

Well espaco, you call the traders in for their normal meet, because they're going to know it's the end either way.

I'm here for one reason and one reason alone. I'm here to guess what the music might do a week, a month, a year from now. That's it. Nothing more. And standing here tonight, I'm afraid that I don't hear a thing.
So, what you're telling me is that the music is about to stop, and we're going to be left holding the biggest bag of odorous excrement ever assembled in the history of capitalism.
And please, speak as you might to a young child. Or a golden retriever. It wasn't brains that brought me here; I assure you that.
We are selling to willing buyers at the current fair market price.
Do you care to know why I'm in this chair with you all? I mean, why I earn the big bucks?
So urgently in fact probably should've been addressed weeks ago. But that is spilt milk under the bridge.

This is bizarre. It's like a... dream.
There are three ways to make a living in this business: be first, be smarter, or cheat.

And it's certainly no different today than it's ever been. 1637, 1797, 1819, 37, 57, 84, 1901, 07, 29, 1937, 1974, 1987 (Jesus, didn't that mess me up good), 92, 97, 2000 and whatever we want to call this.
If you're first out the door, that's not called panicking.
